title: pilosella lactucella subsp. tricheilema
intro: Pilosella lactucella subsp. tricheilema, also known as Trisetum tricheilema, is a rare and lesser-known plant species within the dandelion family. It is believed to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can be utilized to treat various health issues. The health benefits associated with Pilosella lactucella subsp. tricheilema include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and even exhibit antioxidant properties. However, due to its rarity and limited research, specific herbal preparations for this plant are not well-documented, but it is often used in traditional medicine in its raw form or as a dried extract.
